title: Mission Gameplay Screenshot Sequence
description: Build a screenshot sequence that feels like real gameplay coverage, showing mission beats, HUD states, and player-readable action flow.

en.title: Mission Gameplay Screenshot Sequence
en.description: Build a screenshot sequence that feels like real gameplay coverage, showing mission beats, HUD states, and player-readable action flow.

zh-CN.title: 任务流程游戏截图组
zh-CN.description: 围绕一个任务或一局对战做 gameplay screenshot 组图，要求 HUD、任务目标和操作节奏都像真实游戏截图。
